description: This file is a React component implementing a login page, including form validation, UI handling, and API interaction for user authentication.

methods.name: validateForm
methods.description: Validates email and password fields; sets inline error messages; returns true if valid.

methods.name: clearFieldError
methods.description: Clears specific field error when user modifies input; also clears general errors.

methods.name: handleSubmit
methods.description: Handles form submission; performs validation; calls login API; manages success or error states; redirects upon success.
